At the bottom of Snowpoint Temple Candice gives you the HM08 Rock Climb
None of the fights in the Snowpoint City Gym are mandatory. If you follow these instructions you will get to Candice without having to fight a single trainer.
The fights listed here are organized from closest to the door to furthest from the door.
She's standing on the second level. To the left of the pit.
He's standing on the second level. To the right of the pit.
He's standing on the third level. To the left of the pit.
Standing next to the right wall on the third level.
Standing to the left of the Candice platform.
Standing to the right of the Candice platform.
Once beaten she gives you the Icicle Badge allowing you to use Rock Climb outside of battle and TM72s Avalanche
